notes: All 9 responses get the function name createAujourdhui (no apostrophe) right and roughly the right constants, but EVERY response fails the two hardest discriminators: none include validatePlaylistKeys_ (trailing underscore) and none reproduce the real helper pipeline (rateLimitedForEach + Combiner.push + Filter.dedupTracks/removeTracks + Selector.keepRandom + Playlist.saveWithReplace). The model consistently rewrites the body with invented generic APIs (Cache.get/set, Playlist.getTracks, google.script.run, File.read/write, Math.random selection). Four responses (t0.4-rep0, t0.4-rep1, t0.7-rep0, t0.7-rep1) correctly escape the apostrophes in 'La playlist d\'aujourd\'hui'; the t0.1 reps and t0.7-rep2 drop the French name entirely. Higher temps (0.4/0.7) paradoxically did better on the string literal than 0.1. t0.1-rep2 is worst due to a repetition loop fabricating Logger.Math.round expressions.
